column2: ENGLISH
Disaster in the Armory

Something feels wrong as you walk toward the armory.  Normally it is bustling as guards come and go.  Today there is a small crowd standing around silently.  You push your way through to see inside and a giant mess greets you.  A wall gave in, or the roof leaked, or ... it doesn't matter.  What can be done now?
I can clean up this mess myself.  How hard can it be?
I employ people to do this sort of thing.  Specifically, you.  Get to work!
It's a big job.  Round up some workers to help you.
Disaster in the Library
I know just where we can- The clerk cuts off with a screech as he turns the corner to the library. Inside you see piles of soaked books and rotting parchment. What a mess.
I can clean up this mess myself.  How hard can it be?
I employ people to do this sort of thing.  Specifically, you.  Get to work!
It's a big job.  Round up some workers to help you.
